notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-K 0001546417-26-000009 (2026-02-25), part 1 of 5 (Item 1 Business + opening of Item 7 MD&A Financial Overview). fiscal_kpis is null for this chunk, so no KPI rewrites.
All 27 evidence quotes verified as verbatim substrings of the event content.
Brand-level outback_steakhouse_same_store_sales kept separate from company-wide same_store_sales per ontology R9 (brand metric is its own driver).

Skipped (12) as vague/descriptive or duplicative within this part: alcoholic beverage sales mix stat, climate-related regulation list, food safety program description, advertising channel list, digital/technology investment (folded into off_premises_sales), turnaround strategy (concrete lever already captured as restaurant_remodels), restaurant closures (table-only, no narrative causal attribution), international franchise expansion (folded into restaurant_development), bare negative economic conditions (banned category), seasonality (captured by restaurant_traffic), cybersecurity cross-reference pointer, trademark infringement boilerplate.
